overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist running across a dark, misty beach landscape at night. The character moves steadily toward distant mountains, passing a concrete bunker structure and red energy barriers before approaching a small terminal objective in the desolate terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desolate beach with energy barriers and concrete structures

agents.ego_description: running steadily across the dark sand toward distant mountains, passing red energy barriers on the ground

entered.detail: large dark rectangular concrete building with flat roof on the right side of the beach
glowing red horizontal energy lines spanning across the dark sand
jagged dark mountain silhouettes against the night sky with mist at their base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, misty beach at night with the character running forward. A concrete bunker structure stands prominently on the right while glowing red energy barriers stretch across the sand. The character moves steadily toward distant jagged mountains visible through the haze.

agents.ego_description: continuing to run across the open beach terrain as the concrete structure falls behind and the landscape opens up

segments.scene_description: Having passed the concrete bunker and energy barriers, the character runs through an open expanse of dark sand. The mountains ahead appear slightly larger as the distance closes, with mist continuing to obscure the horizon under the starry night sky.

agents.ego_description: maintaining running pace toward the mountains while passing a small glowing terminal structure on the left

entered.detail: small white glowing structure resembling a terminal or beacon on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a small glowing terminal structure comes into view on the left as the character continues running. The mountains loom larger and closer ahead while the terminal passes from the far left to the near left of the frame. The desolate beach environment remains consistent with dark sand and misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a dark, misty beach at night as the character runs from a fortified perimeter toward a distant mountain range. It begins with the character passing a concrete bunker and glowing red energy barriers that stretch across the sand. As these structures recede, the scene opens into a vast expanse of dark sand under a starry sky, with the jagged mountains ahead gradually looming larger through the haze. The camera then tracks the character's steady progress until a small glowing terminal structure emerges from the mist on the left. Finally, the terminal passes by in the foreground as the character continues their approach toward the towering peaks in the desolate landscape.
